fixtures.label: break
fixtures.description: aiohttp.ClientSession created at module level and per-request without async with; connections are never closed. 0 corpus sites for aiohttp; corpus uses httpx.AsyncClient via Depends() lifecycle.

fixtures.label: control
fixtures.description: httpx.AsyncClient as a yield-based Depends() dependency. The dependency owns the client lifecycle (create/yield/close); endpoints contain only application logic. Pattern from FastAPI docs on dependencies-with-yield.
